productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Orange Adi Mesh Flip Flops
description: adidas created this pair of street flip flops for men who want fashion doubled with comfort. The print features the brand name on the foot-bed. Pair them with a tee and your favourite slept-in style denims.UpperThick fabric striped thong strapsFabric toe separator for maximum comfort with branding on the axis of the slipperRubber foot-bed with print for all-day massage feelOutsoleTPR outsole with geometric textured lugs for maximum tractionFlip flop careWipe off dirt with a moist clothDo not machine wash
